name: Cat Fest Pillows With Crab Creme (30G)
description: The excellent combination of crispy crust and the most delicate natural puree from wild crab make this treat a favorite cat treat, and the porous structure helps the pet to brush its teeth. Ingredients: cereals, vegetable protein, wild crab, egg yolk, fish meal, ocean shrimp, Omega 3/6 fatty acids, fruits and vegetables (pomegranate seeds, forest cranberries). Analytical components: crude protein 20%, fats 15%, crude fiber 2.5%, crude ash 4%, moisture 10%; energy value ? 360 kcal.
